title: Gapple Upgrade
description: Adds a new upgrade item similar to the Netherite Upgrade used to create an Enchanted Golden Apple.
body:
Adds a new Smithing Template used to craft an Enchanted Golden Apple in the Smithing Table. ![Item Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2244c145542321958671457563f2d04571d8cbf4.png)

JEI/REI recommended for recipes.

I hope that you can enjoy this mod!


**Please report any bugs/suggestions on the Discord.**

_Made with MCreator - Go check it out!_

_Feel free to use this in your modpack! I'd prefer credit in a link to this mod page._

_I do not permit anyone to reupload this mod onto any other website without my permission. Please report any project not following this guideline._
